summary: Complete codebase audit for stripping non-bimodal code. Found 5 module directories to delete (logos, iterate, jupyter, output/notebook), 30+ coupling points mapped with file:line references, 5 dependency packages to remove from pyproject.toml. Critical finding: bimodal/iterate.py imports BaseModelIterator from iterate/core.py — must delete bimodal/iterate.py (and 3 iterate tests) before deleting iterate/ module. imposition/ and exclusion/ as standalone theory dirs do not exist. Current test baseline: 175 bimodal tests all passing. Post-cleanup target: 172 tests.
